review_text: I have been using the UltraSound Pro speaker for about six months now and I feel I have enough experience to write a comprehensive review. I'll break this down into categories: Sound Quality, Build, Features, and Value. SOUND QUALITY: The bass response is exceptional for a portable speaker of this size. Mid-tones are clear and vocals shine through. The highs are slightly harsh at maximum volume but nothing a little EQ can't fix. Compare to JBL or Bose, the UltraSound Pro holds its own at half the price. BUILD: The aluminum chassis feels premium. The rubber base prevents sliding. One issue: the charging port cover is flimsy and I've already had to tape it in place. It's IPX5 rated but I wouldn't trust it in heavy rain. FEATURES: Bluetooth 5.0 pairs instantly. Battery life is advertised at 20 hours — I consistently get 17-18 which is honest. The built-in mic is passable for calls but I wouldn't use it for anything important. EQ presets are limited; I wish there were more. VALUE: At $89, this is outstanding value. I would happily pay more for a sturdier charging port cover. VERDICT: 4 stars. Would buy again and have already recommended to two friends who both love theirs.

cons: IPX5 not reliable in heavy rain
